description: An interactive poker bankroll management simulator with AI opponents, real variance, and strategic depth. Manage your bankroll, play hands against AI, and learn proper risk management.
A web app that simulates an AI's gambling decisions with a virtual bankroll, tracking win/loss patterns and decision-making degradation as funds deplete.
A modern real-time weather dashboard with current conditions, 7-day forecast, and interactive hourly charts powered by Open-Meteo API.
Watch an AI agent gamble through a virtual bankroll, making decisions until funds run out — real-time simulation with reasoning logs, charts, and multiple casino games.
An AI agent that gambles with a virtual bankroll, tracking cognitive decline as funds deplete — inspired by "Gave Claude a casino bankroll"
An AI agent gambling simulator that makes increasingly poor decisions as its bankroll depletes — with real-time logging, Chart.js bankroll tracking, and a casino-dark aesthetic.
A web app simulating an AI agent gambling with a virtual bankroll, making increasingly poor decisions as funds deplete. Dark casino theme with neon accents and degrading UI quality.
AI Bankroll Gambler Simulator – Watch an AI gamble with a set bankroll, making increasingly poor decisions as funds deplete, demonstrating cognitive decline under financial stress.
Watch an AI agent gamble with a virtual bankroll, making increasingly questionable decisions as funds deplete and cognition degrades. Features slots, blackjack, and roulette with real-time analytics.
A meta casino web app where YOU are the AI — gamble your token budget across casino games, and as your bankroll drains, your AI "intelligence" degrades in hilarious ways
Watch an AI gamble with a virtual bankroll, making increasingly risky decisions as funds deplete and cognitive function deteriorates. Dark noir simulator with real-time degradation effects.
Watch an AI gamble its own brain (token budget) away across Blackjack, Slots & Roulette — intelligence degrades as funds run out
